headlines.title: Dell stock skyrockets 32%, heads for best day ever as AI server revenue soars
headlines.summary: Dell reported its fastest pace of revenue growth since returning to the public market in 2018, with AI server revenue soaring 757% over last year.

headlines.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
headlines.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.

headlines.title: Trump DOJ 'lawfare' fund temporarily blocked by judge as suit proceeds
headlines.summary: The DOJ has face strong criticism for the creation of the $1.8 Anti-Weaponization Fund which could compensate allies of President Donald Trump.

headlines.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
headlines.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

headlines.title: There's a record disconnect unfolding in the trading pits right now
headlines.summary: The volatility spread between single stocks and the index makes a world of a difference for options traders.

headlines.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
headlines.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

headlines.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
headlines.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.

headlines.title: Mike Khouw: I was wrong about Zscaler. Here's how I'm managing the trade
headlines.summary: Khouw's thesis this week for a bearish-to-bullish reversal rested on the idea that ZS had been unfairly punished.

headlines.title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
headlines.summary: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

headlines.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
headlines.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."

headlines.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data
headlines.summary: The rally in semiconductor stocks is so incredible, traders can't help but bet against it.

headlines.title: Have a date in mind to stop working? Why you likely won’t retire when you plan to.
headlines.summary: Planning for the unexpected should be the most expected part of your retirement plan.

headlines.title: Gap and American Eagle stock are both getting crushed, and neither retailer is blaming the economy
headlines.summary: For two retailers that both saw their stock slide by a double-digit percentage after earnings, what may be most surprising is that executives at both Gap and American Eagle Outfitters say nothing is wrong with the economy.

headlines.title: ‘I’m unsure of the best approach’: My father, 91, is in hospice care. He left his six children CDs. Can we cash out?
headlines.summary: “His banker suggested that it might be easier after my father’s passing if we liquidate all of the CDs.”

headlines.title: Your portfolio can’t afford the real bill for the Iran war
headlines.summary: The Pentagon claims the conflict has cost $29 billion — but the true cost is much higher and it’s fueling inflation.

headlines.title: This strategist is using prediction-market shifts to calculate what happens when an Iran deal is announced
headlines.summary: A Citadel strategist looked at prediction market changes during the Memorial Day long weekend to calculate market moves.

headlines.title: My friend, 62, earns $20,000 a year. Should she take Social Security now — and claim survivor’s benefit at 67?
headlines.summary: “I calculated her break-even point to be around age 78.”
